summary: Iteration 23 - Session-End Logic Fix Testing COMPLETE. All backend tests PASSED (15/15). All frontend tests PASSED. The unified session-end logic is working correctly: last game finished → auto-lock, last game aborted → auto-lock, credits remaining → session stays open.
passed_tests: POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/unlock creates session with 1 credit
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/simulate-game-start decrements credit from 1 to 0
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/simulate-game-end (finish) locks board when credits=0
Board status is 'locked' after last game finish, session is None
Overlay returns visible:false after auto-lock
POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/unlock creates session with 1 credit (again for abort test)
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/simulate-game-start decrements credit
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/simulate-game-abort locks board when credits=0 (ABORT = last game)
Board status is 'locked' after last game abort, session is None
Multi-game session: unlock with 3 credits, finish game 1 (stays unlocked), abort game 2 (stays unlocked), finish game 3 (auto-locks)
Credits path: 3→2→1→0 across 3 games with mixed finish/abort VERIFIED
Overlay visible:true when unlocked and active, visible:false when locked
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/simulate-game-abort endpoint exists and works
CODE: Observer observer.py has abort handler for in_game → idle transition (GAME ABORTED)
CODE: Observer uses unified _on_game_ended callback (not separate _on_game_finished)
CODE: kiosk.py has _safe_close_observer function with explicit logging
CODE: kiosk.py _on_game_ended handles finished/aborted/post_finish_check
CODE: Logs contain session_end_decision, board_lock_triggered, browser_close_triggered
FRONTEND: Locked screen renders correctly at /kiosk/BOARD-1
FRONTEND: Observer fallback screen shows when unlocked (Chrome not available on Linux)
FRONTEND: Page title is 'DartsKiosk' for Win32 window identification
FRONTEND: Fallback screen has retry button (observer-retry-btn)
FRONTEND: Fallback screen has call-staff button (fallback-call-staff-btn)
FRONTEND: Fallback screen has end-session button (fallback-end-session-btn)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test scenarios executed: single credit finish, single credit abort, multi-credit mixed (3 games), credit path verification. Board locked after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 tested the SESSION-END LOGIC FIX. KEY CHANGES VERIFIED: 1) Observer now detects in_game → idle transition and calls on_game_ended(reason='aborted'). 2) Unified _on_game_ended(board_id, reason) callback handles ALL end scenarios: 'finished', 'aborted', 'post_finish_check'. 3) New simulate-game-abort endpoint works correctly. 4) _safe_close_observer wraps observer close with explicit error logging. CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Aborting a started game when it's the last credit now correctly triggers auto-lock. On Linux preview env without Chrome, observer fails with 'Chromium distribution chrome not found' - this is EXPECTED. The session-end chain (session finalize → board lock → browser close → overlay close) now works for both finish AND abort scenarios.

abort_handler.comment: GAME ABORTED handler in observe loop

credit_logic.decrement: Credits decremented on game START (idle → in_game)
credit_logic.lock_decision: Made on game END (finished or aborted) when credits=0

acceptance_criteria_verified.last_game_finished_auto_locks: PASS - Board locks when credits exhausted after finish
acceptance_criteria_verified.last_game_aborted_auto_locks: PASS - Board locks when credits exhausted after abort (BUG FIX)
acceptance_criteria_verified.credits_remaining_stays_open: PASS - Session stays open when credits > 0
